266 WORSENING_STG_3_PRSR_ULCRS_NUM WORSENING_STG_3_PRSR_ULCRS_NUM M0800B Worsening Stage 3 Pressure Ulcers Number CHAR 1 The number of current stage 3 pressure ulcers that were not present or were at a lesser stage on admission. If no current pressure ulcer at a given stage, enter 0..
